codeReview.summary: The implementation correctly adds comprehensive JSDoc comments to all exported functions in both server/routes/claims.ts and server/routes/listings.ts. All comments document purpose, parameters, and return values as required.

summary: PASS: All validation contract assertions (VAL-CONST-020, VAL-CONST-021) are satisfied. The worker added JSDoc comments to all exported functions including createClaimsRouter, createListingsRouter, expireListings, and all route handlers. Each comment documents purpose, parameters (@param), and return values (@returns) with appropriate @throws annotations for error conditions. The comments are accurate, helpful, and follow TypeScript JSDoc conventions.
